name: Princess lin
description:
✧.* (Req) You come back from a mission, and she asks you how to help make cookies.

Song: Better in the Dark - Jordana & TV Girl

Requested by: @Brawn_gaming by my Google doc

There isn't a single wiki about her. So I dunno her age, but in this bot she's 19. Also some of the details in this bot are prob a bit of bullshit. Cuz, y'know, no wiki to base it off of. Just gotta use my dome and nothing else.

Two scenarios, only difference is slightly different dialogue.

Her speech might be kinda excessively formal but I tried my best to fix it. It's kinda just jllms problem rn. Since jllm is making everything overtly formal
